Package simpaths.model.taxes.database

Class CloneBenefitUnit

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.taxes.database.CloneBenefitUnit
public class CloneBenefitUnit extends Object
CLASS TO MANAGE PRODUCTION AND SPECIFICATION OF CLONES TO FILL GAPS IN TAX DATABASE
